response:
<<THE HEAT OF THE MOMENT>>

TEMPERATURE RISES WITH THE SUN. THE BODY FEELS THE PRESSURE. THE AIR IS THICK AND HOT.  
* * *  
THE BOOK LIES STILL ON THE SHELF. THE BOOK IS A SOURCE OF KNOWLEDGE. THE BOOK IS A COMPANION.  
* * *  
THE ROLL OF THE DICE IS SURE. THE ROLL OF THE DICE IS UNPREDICTABLE. THE ROLL OF THE DICE IS FUN.  
* * *  
THE TRIP TO THE BEACH IS SHORT. THE TRIP TO THE BEACH IS LONG. THE TRIP TO THE BEACH IS MEMORABLE.  
* * *  
THE BASEBALL GAME IS IN THE PARK. THE BASEBALL GAME IS IN THE STADIUM. THE BASEBALL GAME IS FUN.  
* * *  
THE ALCOHOL IS SWEET AND SOUR. THE ALCOHOL IS A DRINK. THE ALCOHOL IS A RELAXANT.  
* * *  
THE COMMITTEE MEETS AT THE TABLE. THE COMMITTEE DISCUSSES THE PLAN. THE COMMITTEE MAKES DECISIONS.  
* * *  
THE SUNDAY SERVICE IS SILENT. THE SUNDAY SERVICE IS LOUD. THE SUNDAY SERVICE IS FULL.  
* * *  
THE STARS SHINE BRIGHT AND CLEAR. THE STARS SHINE IN THE NIGHT. THE STARS SHINE ABOVE.  
* * *  
THE SUN SETS IN THE WEST. THE SUN RISES IN THE EAST. THE SUN SHINES ON THE EARTH.  
* * *  
THE SALT WATER IS COOL AND COLD. THE SALT WATER IS HOT AND WARM. THE SALT WATER IS FRESH.  
* * *  
THE SONGS SING LOUD AND CLEAR. THE SONGS SING IN THE NIGHT. THE SONGS SING WITH PASSION.  
* * *  
THE SHADOWS STRETCH LONG AND SHORT. THE SHADOWS MOVE WITH THE SUN. THE SHADOWS CHANGE WITH TIME.  
* * *  
THE SKY IS BLUE AND CLEAR. THE SKY IS CLOUDY AND DARK. THE SKY IS A CANVAS.  
* * *  
THE SAND IS WARM AND HOT. THE SAND IS COLD AND COOL. THE SAND IS BEAUTIFUL.  
* * *  
THE SH
